case_title: TAMERA LINK VS. MARDOLLA GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINK, TAMERA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF HEARING 6/16/21 @ 10AM SERVED MAR-17-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC. DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: DOJI LLAMAS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINK, TAMERA AS TO DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC. DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT**DENIED** -DEFENDANT'S 2ND REQUEST, 1ST ONE WAS GRANTED ON 6/14/21
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC. DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DOJI LLAMAS, MARDOLLA GROUP INC. FILED BY DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC. DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC. DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-27-2021)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LINK, TAMERA AS TO DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC. DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-27-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TAMERA LINK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP INC., DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MID-PENINSULA, REPRESENTED BY DOJI LLAMAS, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT'S AN ORAL MOTION TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO ADD WAI CHUNG (PROPERTY OWNER) AS A NAMED DEFENDANT AND TO DISMISS THE CURRENTLY NAMED DEFENDANT OF MARDOLLA GROUP IS GRANTED IN COURT. DEFENDANT MORDOLLA GOUR, INC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. WAI CHUNG IS ADDED AS A NAMED DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF RETURNES CHECK 	86 IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,450.00 TO DEFENDANT IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINK, TAMERA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, WAI $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, DEFENDANT MARDOLLA GROUP, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. **SEE ATTACHED MC-025** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
